cn.description:
“一路”是由cottongame出品的一款极具创意的点触解谜游戏，游戏目的是在每一层场景中寻找到一颗蓝色的小球，从而获取电梯上升的能量。
玩家必须通过认真地观察和判断，才能解答开这些各不相同的谜题。
每一次的上升，玩家都将面对一个全新的奇妙世界，独特的手绘风格，让章鱼、大象、机器人、食人花变得鲜活起来，而这些，仅仅是冰山一角，更多的秘密、更多的挑战，等着你的到来。

在《迷失岛2 时间的灰烬》 结尾，小火箭终于飞向了太空。
那之后发生了什么呢？

作为迷失岛系列的第3部，我们给了玩家这个一窥究竟的机会，其实本质上是给我们自己的好奇心和创造力同样的一个机会。

我想用我爱的埃舍尔来为《迷失岛3宇宙的尘埃》做一个注脚。
来阐述人类艺术的重要性。
所有迷失岛的玩家都会继续带着你们的好奇心再次出发。
希望你们能在这个游戏的最后找到你们为什么会爱它的---所有答案。

本作依然有沿袭一贯的美术风格，丰富的随机谜题，不一样的二周目玩法，有趣的收集和成就。

你搭载火箭，穿越星际，来到一个陌生的星球。这里缺乏植被，满地岩石。蓝色的大海之上却是赤色的天空。来到这里的还有别的人类，你会遇到古老的遗迹，神秘的轮船，怪异的飞船。突破种种谜团...

这次，你又该何去何从？

cn.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.
cn.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.

圓守衛是彈來彈去的地牢爬行者，結合彈珠台打法、掠奪許多寶物，以及滿是怪物流竄的隨機城堡。在圓形的回彈冒險旅途中，對抗許多危險又可愛的怪獸，並挑戰沿路層出不窮的類惡霸！

如果你喜歡類惡霸遊戲和《撞撞球》，一定也會愛上圓守衛。

彈來彈去趣味多：直覺式的彈珠台打法，跟其他地牢爬行遊戲截然不同。

多種類別：可以擔任戰士、惡霸或巫師，分別擁有各自的特殊技能、物品和惡搞的幽默感。

隨機地牢：每次遊戲會透過程序產生等級，並隨機安排任務事件和精美怪獸。

永久死亡贈好物：角色死亡時，你可以將特殊寶物帶到下一回合。你拿到的金幣越多，收集到最強大寶物的機會就越大。

怪物角色：與城堡裡色彩繽紛的怪物交談取得任務，並瞭解為什麼有些老鼠希望除掉國王、哪些事情激怒了當地的年輕骷髏，或者戰士如果來不及跑廁所會怎麼辦。

掠奪大量寶物：提供上百種物品和寶物，各有象徵策略選擇的不同效果，且有些可結合使用。

展現你的技能：爭奪排行榜上的名次，並盡量學會所有具有挑戰性、不按牌理出牌的寶物。

hk.description:
REFEREE CAREER: SOCCER DECISION MAKER
BLOW THE WHISTLE, MAKE THE CALL
Step into the boots of a professional soccer referee in this unique career simulation game. Your decisions shape matches, championships, and your own career path. Start from the bottom of the referee ranks and work your way up to the elite professional level!

* Call fouls, award penalties, and show cards
* Manage player confrontations and maintain control
* Use VAR technology to review critical moments
* Time your calls perfectly to maintain match flow
* Experience unique match scenarios each game
COMPREHENSIVE REFEREE CAREER
Begin your journey in the lower divisions (C Class) and climb your way to the prestigious Professional Class:
* C Class: Amateur matches, perfect for learning the basics
* B Class: Semi-professional matches with growing expectations
* A Class: Professional matches with intense scrutiny
* PRO Class: Elite matches with the highest pressure and rewards
Your performance determines how quickly you advance through the ranks. Exceptional referees can fast-track their careers!
MATCH AFTERMATH & REPUTATION
Every decision you make affects your reputation in the soccer world:
* View detailed post-match performance ratings
* Read social media reactions to your most controversial calls
* See how fans, players, and coaches respond to your decisions
LEAGUE TABLE & CHAMPIONSHIP IMPACT
Your decisions don't just affect individual matches - they can change entire championships:
* Access league tables to see team standings
* Understand the stakes of each match you officiate
* Balance fairness with the intense atmosphere of crucial matches
REFEREE DEVELOPMENT & CUSTOMIZATION
Earn money from each match based on your performance and division level:
* Visit the Referee Shop to purchase new equipments
AUTHENTIC SOCCER EXPERIENCE
Immerse yourself in a realistic soccer world:
* Detailed Text-Based match simulations with dynamic player movements
* Weather conditions that affect match flow and visibility
VAR TECHNOLOGY MASTERY
Modern soccer relies on 2D video review technology - master it to excel:
* Make the final call after careful analysis
* Review incidents from multiple camera angles
* Make the final call after careful analysis
REALISTIC PROGRESSION SYSTEM
Your career advancement depends on consistent performance:
* Complete season objectives to earn promotions
* Risk demotion if your performance falls below standards
Experience the beautiful game from a completely new perspective! REFEREE CAREER: SOCCER DECISION SIMULATOR puts you in control of the most important decisions in the sport. Your journey from amateur fields to professional stadiums begins with a whistle and a rulebook. Do you have what it takes to reach the top of the refereeing world?
Download now and make the call!

https://www.akinaksoydev.com/frs-privacy

fixes some known issues.

kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
hk.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

mo.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
mo.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

tw.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
tw.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

Awards:

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. pt.description:
1942. Segunda Guerra Mundial. Tu e as tuas tropas estais em serviço no Pacífico – e só pode haver um vencedor…

A batalha continua após "1941 Frozen Front" – e, desta vez, tudo gira em torno da guerra naval! Junta-te à marinha e luta para vencer a batalha da tua vida! Domina o campo de batalha e envia os teus soldados para a linha da frente. Combate militar no seu melhor!

Escolhe as táticas certas e utiliza o teu comando para derrotar o inimigo! Lidera o Exército dos EUA na sua campanha ou comanda as forças japonesas na sua missão! Elimina alianças inimigas com infantaria, artilharia, tanques, aviões de guerra, couraçados e submarinos, e conquista as tuas divisas como um comandante genial na PACIFIC FRONT!

BRIEFING DA MISSÃO

- LUTA com armas poderosas como torpedos e bombas!
- DESTRÓI posições inimigas com tanques e infantaria!
- BOMBARDEIA quartéis-generais hostis com poderosas esquadras de bombardeiros!
- SURPREENDE o inimigo com ataques do teu submarino!
- POSICIONA a tua artilharia em terrenos acidentados!
- LIMPA praias, lagoas e estreitos!
- EMBOSCA o inimigo!
- ABASTECE o teu exército com mercadorias e munições!
- DEFENDE os teus porta-aviões e couraçados!

Características:
- Joga sem anúncios!
- Ação estratégica por turnos ambientada na 2ª Guerra Mundial
- Campanhas emocionantes e missões desafiantes
- Unidades históricas dos EUA e do Japão
- Infantaria, artilharia, tanques, aviões, couraçados e submarinos para ambas as fações
- Reparação, camuflagem e fortificação de unidades durante as batalhas
- Batalhas multijogador local (Hot-hand)
- Grelha hexagonal para a melhor visão geral possível
- Gráficos detalhados e sons super-realistas
- Suporte total para tablets

Obrigado por jogares ‘1942 Pacific Front’!

© HandyGames 2026

pt.description:
CARREIRA DE ÁRBITRO: DECISOR DE FUTEBOL
APITE, TOME A DECISÃO
Vista as chuteiras de um árbitro profissional de futebol neste jogo único de simulação de carreira. Suas decisões moldam partidas, campeonatos e seu próprio caminho na carreira. Comece do início na hierarquia de árbitros e trabalhe seu caminho até o nível profissional de elite!

Marque faltas, conceda pênaltis e mostre cartões
Administre confrontos entre jogadores e mantenha o controle
Utilize a tecnologia VAR para revisar momentos críticos
Sincronize perfeitamente suas decisões para manter o fluxo da partida
Experimente cenários únicos em cada jogo

CARREIRA COMPLETA DE ÁRBITRO
Inicie sua jornada nas divisões inferiores (Classe C) e suba até a prestigiada Classe Profissional:

Classe C: Partidas amadoras, perfeitas para aprender o básico
Classe B: Partidas semiprofissionais com expectativas crescentes
Classe A: Partidas profissionais com intenso escrutínio
Classe PRO: Partidas de elite com maior pressão e recompensas

Seu desempenho determina quão rápido você avança nas categorias. Árbitros excepcionais podem acelerar suas carreiras!
CONSEQUÊNCIAS PÓS-JOGO E REPUTAÇÃO
Cada decisão que você toma afeta sua reputação no mundo do futebol:

Veja avaliações detalhadas de desempenho pós-jogo
Leia reações nas redes sociais sobre suas decisões mais controversas
Observe como torcedores, jogadores e técnicos respondem às suas decisões

IMPACTO NA TABELA E NO CAMPEONATO
Suas decisões não afetam apenas jogos individuais - podem mudar campeonatos inteiros:

Acesse tabelas para ver a classificação das equipes
Entenda o que está em jogo em cada partida que você arbitra
Equilibre a justiça com a atmosfera intensa de partidas cruciais

DESENVOLVIMENTO E PERSONALIZAÇÃO DO ÁRBITRO
Ganhe dinheiro em cada partida com base em seu desempenho e nível de divisão:

Visite a Loja do Árbitro para comprar novos equipamentos

EXPERIÊNCIA AUTÊNTICA DE FUTEBOL
Mergulhe em um mundo realista de futebol:

Simulações detalhadas de partidas baseadas em texto com movimentos dinâmicos dos jogadores
Condições climáticas que afetam o fluxo do jogo e a visibilidade

DOMÍNIO DA TECNOLOGIA VAR
O futebol moderno depende da tecnologia de revisão em vídeo 2D - domine-a para se destacar:

Tome a decisão final após análise cuidadosa
Revise incidentes de múltiplos ângulos de câmera
Tome a decisão final após análise cuidadosa

SISTEMA REALISTA DE PROGRESSÃO
Seu avanço na carreira depende de desempenho consistente:

Complete objetivos da temporada para ganhar promoções
Arrisque rebaixamento se seu desempenho cair abaixo dos padrões

Experimente o belo jogo de uma perspectiva completamente nova! CARREIRA DE ÁRBITRO: SIMULADOR DE DECISÕES NO FUTEBOL coloca você no controle das decisões mais importantes do esporte. Sua jornada dos campos amadores aos estádios profissionais começa com um apito e um livro de regras. Você tem o que é preciso para chegar ao topo do mundo da arbitragem?
Baixe agora e tome a decisão!
